name: @brand-gen/pi-extension
description: Pi extension for brand-gen with heartbeat, widget, commands, and MCP bridge

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/index.ts && node --check src/core.ts && node --check src/tool.ts && node --check src/memory.ts && node --check src/mcp-bridge.ts && if command -v tsc >/dev/null 2>&1; then tsc --noEmit; else echo 'warning: tsc not installed; syntax-only fallback used'; fi
